notes: Lubrizol's personal care division is the world's leading supplier of Carbopol® carbomer polymers, the industry standard for rheology modification in skincare, hair care, and pharmaceutical topical formulations. Their Styleze™ film former range is widely used in styling products and long-wear cosmetics. Lubrizol's sensory polymer portfolio enables formulators to create products with precisely tuned texture profiles, from ultra-lightweight serums to rich, luxurious creams, making them an essential supplier for serious cosmetic formulators worldwide.

Lubrizol's personal care division is the world's leading supplier of Carbopol® carbomer polymers, which are the global industry standard for rheology modification across skincare, hair care, pharmaceutical topicals, and personal lubricants. Their Styleze™ film former range addresses long-wear, barrier, and shine requirements in styling products and color cosmetics. Lubrizol's sensory polymer portfolio provides formulators with the tools to precisely tune texture profiles from ultra-light water serums to opulent rich creams. EFfCI GMP certified production and extensive global formulation support make Lubrizol an essential partner for brands seeking the highest standards of quality and technical expertise in texture modification.
